content:
Today’s 9to5Toys Lunch Break is headlined by Apple’s most affordable new M5 Pro MacBook Pro hitting its best price ever at $200 off, alongside the new 15-inch 1TB M5 MacBook Air at $150 off. We also have a chance at landing Apple Watch Ultra 2 down as low as $380 joining this official Apple Watch band sale – Alpine/Trail Loops from $35 as well as Sport and Nike models from $15 (65% off) and the ability to expand the battery life of AirTag 1 or 2 by up to 10 years with these Elevation Lab cases from $9 each. Head below for a closer look.

Apple’s most affordable new M5 Pro MacBook Pro just hit its best price ever at $200 off

This morning Amazon has dropped Apple’s most affordable M5 Pro MacBook Pro model down to a new all-time low at $200 off the list price. The 2026 MacBook Pro deals roll on today after seeing some new all-time lows on M5 Pro models this week and a $400 price drop on the wild 48GB M5 Max, but now it’s time for the least expensive config in the lineup.

Amazon is now offering the 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro with 24GB of RAM and 1TB of storage down at $1,999 shipped. This is a regularly $2,099 machine hitting the lowest price we have ever tracked on Amazon at $200 off the list price.

Previous to now, we had never tracked this model at any better than $2,048 – this is the price the silver model is fetching right now as only the Space Black has hit the new all-time low at $200. We will keep an eye out for the classic silver.

Apple’s most powerful M5 Pro and M5 Max machines certainly come at a price, and there are some deals live on the far less expensive M5 MacBook Air right now. But for those looking to upgrade to the latest pro-grade 2026 machines, the most affordable of them all is now at its best price to date.

You’ll find a breakdown of this best MacBook Pro deals below, and for those looking towards the seriously high-end machines, scope out the deals right here.

  • 14-inch M5 MacBook Pro 16GB/1TB from $1,591 (Reg. $1,699)
  • 14-inch M5 MacBook Pro 24GB/1TB from $1,759 (Reg. $1,899) – best price of the year
  • 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/1TB $1,999 (Reg. $2,199) – new all-time low
  • 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/2TB $2,499 (Reg. $2,699) – new all-time low at $200 off
  • 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 48GB/1TB $2,899 (Reg. $3,099)
  • 14-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,364 (Reg. $3,599)
  • 16-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,699 (Reg. $3,899)

Apple’s 2TB 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro just a new Amazon all-time low at over $170 off

Apple’s new 15-inch 1TB M5 MacBook Air is $150 off right now, more

We have had a strong run of deals on Apple’s brand new M5 MacBook Air lineup since launch. While many of the configurations have now jumped back up in price, we are still tracking all four colors of the 1TB 13-inch model at all-time low pricing and this morning we are highlighting the remaining deals on the 24GB 15-incher – all but the Starlight model are live today at $150 off the list price.

Amazon is serving up the brand new 15-inch M5 MacBook Air with 24GB of RAM and the 1TB SSD down at $1,549 shipped. Regularly $1,699, this is a straight up $150 price drop and the lowest price we can find.

Today’s deal represents the lowest price we have tracked at Amazon or any other reputable authorized source online since the new M5 Air lineup landed last month.

I think it’s safe to say this particular configuration is about as spec’d out and upgraded as you’ll want to go when it comes to the MacBook Air lineup. Anything more than this will put you up into a price range close enough to potentially warrant a MacBook Pro purchase instead.

There are certainly more affordable M5 Airs you can buy, but if you’re looking towards a future-proofed 2026 MacBook purchase with some relatively powerful specs, this is about as good as it gets before you want might to use that money towards a pro machine, if you ask me. A 36GB 1TB M5 Air is $1,899 and a 36GB 2TB is more than the price of the M5 Pro MacBook Pro – it’s also worth considering that Amazon doesn’t carry these machines and you’ll likely have to pay full price for them.

  • 13-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/1TB from $1,149 (Reg. $1,299)
  • 13-inch M5 MacBook Air 24GB/1TB from $1,349 (Reg. $1,499)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/512GB from $1,149 (Reg. $1,299)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/1TB from $1,349 (Reg. $1,499)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 24GB/1TB from $1,549 (Reg. $1,699)

Official Apple Watch band sale: Giant deals hit Alpine/Trail Loops from $35, Sport and Nike models from $15 (65% off)

Woot just launched a new official Apple Watch band sale featuring some particularly wild deals on Apple’s Alpine Loop and Trail Loop as well as some Sport and Nike models as well. There are limited sizes and colors available on some of them, but we are talking about some giant 65% price drops here – you can score an original $99 official Apple Trail or Alpine Loop for just $35 or a Sport model as low as $15.

  • Apple Watch Ultra Trail Loop $35 (Orig. $99)
  • Apple Watch Ultra Alpine Loop $35 (Orig. $99)
  • Apple Nike Sport Band $20 (Orig. $49)
  • Apple Watch Sport Loop $20 (Orig. $49)
  • Apple Watch Sport Band $15 (Orig. $49)

While we aren’t talking about the latest colorways here, we are seeing some seriously low prices for official Apple bands that are still compatible with even the newest Apple Watch models.

The Alpine and Trail Loops for Apple Watch Ultra are a little more limited in terms of size and color, but there are options for just about any size Series model Apple Watch on the Sport Band and Sport Loop. There is a very good chance some of the sizes and colors across each option begin to start selling out as we move through the morning here, so it might be a good idea to get in there as soon as possible to see if anything catches your eye.

All five models in the sale ship with the usual 1-year Apple warranty, according to the listings.

Expand the battery life of AirTag 1 or 2 by up to 10 years with these Elevation Lab cases from $9 each

M3 iPad Air clearance deals now live via Amazon at up to $250 off

Today’s accessories and charging deals:

  • Clearance pricing now live on originally $650 Samsung ViewFinity 34-inch ultrawide QHD monitor at $380 (All-time low)
  • This 4TB WD_BLACK 7,250MB/s SSD is great for PC/PS5, and it’s now down to its lowest since price hike
  • This 100W display-equipped 5-port USB-C Nexode Pro charger undercuts the competition at $50 today (All-time low)
  • Latest flagship Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds $50 off at Amazon today (5 color options)
  • Curb energy usage with meross’ recently-released 18-circuit Apple Home electrical panel monitor, now $160 (Reg. $250)
  • Qi2 15W 3-in-1 MagSafe charging stations don’t get much less than this, steal this one for just $15 (65% off)
  • Sharge’s all-new 45W 10K mini power bank with orbital power indicator and built-in USB-C cable now up for grabs [Launch Deal]
  • This travel-ready 7-in-1 power strip packs 65W USB-C for $27 (Save $10)
  • Score Apple’s elusive black USB-C cables from $7 each while you still can
  • Land a 4-pack of AirTags at one of the best prices to date: Now at $14 each

Score a current-gen iPad today down at $299 shipped

If you’re looking for an easy and super sweet gift for mom or just a casual tablet for around the house/on the road, Apple’s latest entry iPad 11 is a solid option. And Amazon has now dropped the price on the blue model back down to the spring sale rate at $299 shipped.

Amazon is now offering the 11-inch iPad (A16) at $299 shipped. As of right now only the blue model is down this low but we will keep a close eye out for the other three.

iPad 11 carries a $349 list price, so, while this is not a giant discount, we are already talking about an affordable tablet (by Apple standards).

Today’s deal lands on par with the price drops we featured during the Big Spring Sale last month to match the best price of the year thus far. There were some discounts for slightly less during the Black Friday season last year, but this is the best since – it lands within $25 of the lowest we have ever tracked at Amazon, for the record.

For those of you looking to score a deal on a more powerful iPad, these offers the new M4 iPad Air and the M3 iPad clearance pricing is certainly worth a look:

M3 iPad Air 11-inch clearance deals:

  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 256GB $649 (Reg. $849)
  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 512GB $849 (Reg. $1,049)
  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 1TB $999 (Reg. $1,249)

M4 iPad Air 11-inch

  • 11-inch M4 iPad Air 128GB $559 (Reg. $599)
  • 11-inch M4 iPad Air 256GB $641 (Reg. $699)
  • 11-inch M4 iPad Air 512GB $836 (Reg. $899)
  • 11-inch M4 iPad Air 1TB $1,016 (Reg. $1,099)

M4 iPad Air 13-inch

  • 13-inch M4 iPad Air 128GB $746 (Reg. $799)
  • 13-inch M4 iPad Air 256GB $836 (Reg. $899)
  • 13-inch M4 iPad Air 512GB $1,019 (Reg. $1,099)
  • 13-inch M4 iPad Air 1TB $1,199 (Reg. $1,299)

Satechi launches all-new ChargeView 140W Desktop Charger with display and stand
